briefdescription.para: Construct with namespace and flash configuration.
Initialize the storage system and open the namespace.

simplesect.para: hf_nvs_err_t::NVS_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Deinitialize the storage system and close the namespace.

simplesect.para: hf_nvs_err_t::NVS_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise
hf_nvs_err_t::NVS_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

parameterdescription.para: Reference to store the retrieved value

simplesect.para: hf_nvs_err_t::NVS_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise
hf_nvs_err_t::NVS_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *key, char *buffer, size_t buffer_size, size_t *actual_size=nullptr) noexcept override
memberdef.name: GetString

parameterdescription.para: Buffer to store the retrieved string
Size of the buffer in bytes

simplesect.para: hf_nvs_err_t::NVS_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *key, const void *data, size_t data_size) noexcept override
memberdef.name: SetBlob

simplesect.para: hf_nvs_err_t::NVS_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *key, void *buffer, size_t buffer_size, size_t *actual_size=nullptr) noexcept override
memberdef.name: GetBlob

parameterdescription.para: Buffer to store the retrieved data
Size of the buffer in bytes

simplesect.para: hf_nvs_err_t::NVS_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise
hf_nvs_err_t::NVS_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Commit any pending writes to non-volatile storage.

simplesect.para: hf_nvs_err_t::NVS_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Check if a key exists in storage.

simplesect.para: true if key exists, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Get the size of a stored value.

simplesect.para: hf_nvs_err_t::NVS_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Get description of this storage implementation.
Get available free space in current sector (bytes)
Find entry in RAM cache by key.

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *key, EntryType type, const void *data, size_t data_size) noexcept
memberdef.name: AddOrUpdateCache

briefdescription.para: Add or update entry in RAM cache.
Write all dirty entries to flash.
Read entries from flash into RAM cache.
STM32 NVS — flash-backed key-value store with wear leveling.

detaileddescription.para:
Design:
Uses a flat log of {key_len, key[], type, data_len, data[]} entries
New writes append; reads scan from end to find latest value
Commit triggers flash write of dirty entries
When sector is full, compact (copy live entries to backup sector, erase, swap)
Supports U32, String, and Blob value types

simplesect.para: Flash operations require HAL_FLASH_Unlock/Lock — handled internally.
